ascendancies.name: Infernalist
ascendancies.flavourText: You seek power at any cost... and there is no price too high to pay.

ascendancies.name: Blood Mage
ascendancies.flavourText: Your search for power took you on a journey inwards.

ascendancies.name: Lich
ascendancies.flavourText: Death is your domain, your flesh merely a material to be mastered.

ascendancies.name: Abyssal Lich
ascendancies.flavourText: The Well of Souls is yours to command.

ascendancies.name: Deadeye
ascendancies.flavourText: A woman can change the world with a single well-placed arrow.

ascendancies.name: Pathfinder
ascendancies.flavourText: There are venoms and virtues aplenty in the wilds, if you know where to look.

ascendancies.name: Titan
ascendancies.flavourText: Incredible might has always laid buried within you. Now is the time to rise.

ascendancies.name: Warbringer
ascendancies.flavourText: Your home has been threatened. A good man must be roused to war.

ascendancies.name: Smith of Kitava
ascendancies.flavourText: You hunger for power, and by force of arms, you will take it.

ascendancies.name: Stormweaver
ascendancies.flavourText: The rumble of thunder heralds your approach. Woe to those that draw your ire.

ascendancies.name: Chronomancer
ascendancies.flavourText: The tapestry of time is yours to weave; an element you alone may master.

ascendancies.name: Disciple of Varashta
ascendancies.flavourText: By your command, they will earn redemption...one duty at a time.

ascendancies.name: Amazon
ascendancies.flavourText: You became a weapon of war so that others could live in peace.

ascendancies.name: Spirit Walker
ascendancies.flavourText: You were chosen by the Sacred Wisps to enact the Spirit's will.

ascendancies.name: Ritualist
ascendancies.flavourText: Corruption cost you your home, but taught you so much more...

ascendancies.name: Tactician
ascendancies.flavourText: Countless wars have left you with skills somewhat resembling a decent officer...

ascendancies.name: Witchhunter
ascendancies.flavourText: There's something very wrong with this world... and you're going to fix it.

ascendancies.name: Gemling Legionnaire
ascendancies.flavourText: The more you embrace virtue gems, the more power they offer...

ascendancies.name: Martial Artist
ascendancies.flavourText: They made you a human weapon... but that strength has set you free.

ascendancies.name: Invoker
ascendancies.flavourText: True strength lies within. One must only focus... and believe.

ascendancies.name: Acolyte of Chayula
ascendancies.flavourText: The truth of your faith threatens to break your very soul... but in that struggle lies power beyond belief.

ascendancies.name: Oracle
ascendancies.flavourText: There are many paths to achieve your goals... and you see them all.

ascendancies.name: Shaman
ascendancies.flavourText:
Wraeclast has suffered for too long.
You are vengeance incarnate.

40.name: Sustainable Practices
stats: 50% of [Evasion|Evasion Rating] also grants [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] reduction

110.name: Internal Layer
stats: Body Armour grants [HitDamage|Hits] against you have 100% reduced [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus]

664.name: Choice of Power
stats: [Remnant|Remnants] can be collected from 50% further away
All [FlamesOfChayula|Flames of Chayula] that you manifest are [PurpleFlamesOfChayula|Purple]

765.name: The Catha's Balance
stats: [Companion|Companions] gain added [Attack] damage equal to 60% of your main hand Weapon's damage

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Channelling|Channel] to create fleeting images of your astral self near the target location. The images perform a Socketed [Melee] [Attack] once then vanish, targeting the closest enemy if possible. The images cannot perform [Channelling|Channelled] Skills or [Conditional] Skills. Consuming a [Charges|Power Charge] creates additional images.

stats: Images can be created within 6 metre radius of you
Creating an Image spends 80% of Socketed Skill's Cost
Consumes a [Charges|Power Charge] to create 2 additional Images

grantedSkill.descrText: Place one or more Skill Gems into this Meta Gem's sockets in the Skills Panel. The socketed Skills will be incorporated into the Meta Gem's effect.

1855.name: Flask Recovery
stats: 12% increased Life and Mana Recovery from [Flask|Flasks]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Recruit artillery [Minion|Minions] that take up positions behind you. They will lie in wait for your [Command], then fire volleys of arrows at the target location.

stats:
Minions from this skill have 1% increased Area of Effect
per 3 of your [Dexterity]

[Minion|Minions] from this skill have 1% increased Damage
per 1 of your [Strength]

pages.description: Fires a flare at a target location, attaching to an enemy if it lands on one, then launches a series of arrow volleys centred around the flare.

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

2516.name: Price of Power
stats: [Spell|Spells] consume a [Charges|Power Charge] if able to deal 40% more Damage

2810.name: Varashta's Intuition
stats: 100% of [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] is taken from Mana before Life

2857.name: Strike Twice
stats: Targets can be affected by two of your [Shock]s at the same time

2877.name: Blackened Heart
stats: 4% increased [BuffMagnitude|Magnitude] of [UnholyMight|Unholy Might] [Buff|Buffs] you grant per 100 maximum Mana

2995.name: Energy Shield if Consumed Power Charge
stats: 30% increased maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] if you've consumed a [Charges|Power Charge] [Recently|Recently]

3065.name: Mystic Harvest
stats: [LifeLeech|Life Leech] recovers based on your [ElementalDamage|Elemental] damage as well as [Physical] damage

3084.name: Reduced Attribute Requirements
stats: Equipment and Skill Gems have 4% reduced [Attributes|Attribute] Requirements

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Manipulate time, resetting the cooldowns of your other Skills.
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

3704.name: Witchbane
stats: Enemies have Maximum [Concentration] equal to 30% of their Maximum Life
Break enemy [Concentration] on [HitDamage|Hit] equal to 100% of Damage Dealt
Enemies regain 10% of [Concentration] every second if they haven't lost [Concentration] in the past 5 seconds

3762.name: Ancestral Empowerment
stats: Every second [Slam] Skill you use yourself is [AncestralBoost|Ancestrally Boosted]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Send out a temporal [Nova] to take advantage of enemies' moment of vulnerability. [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun], [PrimedElectrocution|Electrocution], or [PrimedFreeze|Freeze] causes a visage of them to appear, lasting as long as the original target would have been affected by the form of [Immobilised|Immobilisation] used to create the visage. A portion of the damage dealt to visages is also dealt to the original.

stats: 10 second delay before enemy can be affected again
60% of damage dealt to temporal visages is also dealt to the original targets

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

4367.name: The Mhacha's Gift
stats:
Dodging can expend up to 3 Owl Feathers, granting Primal Bounty 100% more
[Empowered|Empowerment] effect per additional Feather expended

5563.name: Flask Recovery
stats: 15% increased Life and Mana Recovery from [Flask|Flasks]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, firing a ranged [Projectile] [Attack] will create a Mirage that uses socketed ranged [Attack|Attacks] for a short duration, then vanish.
grantedSkill.descrText: Place one or more Skill Gems into this Meta Gem's sockets in the Skills Panel. The socketed Skills will be incorporated into the Meta Gem's effect.

6127.name: Jade Heritage

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Consume all stacks of [Jade] to grant [Guard] based off your maximum Life for each [Jade] consumed. You cannot gain [Jade] stacks while you have [Guard].

stats: Gain [Guard] equal to 6% of your maximum life per [Jade] consumed

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

stats: Gain a stack of [Jade] every second

6935.name: Ceremonial Ablution
stats: Sorcery Ward's Barrier can also take [Physical] and [Chaos] Damage from [HitDamage|Hits]

7068.name: Mystic Attunement
stats: 25% increased bonuses gained from Equipped Rings and Amulets

7621.name: I am the Thunder...
stats: 25% chance on [Shock|Shocking] Enemies to created [ShockedGround|Shocked Ground]

7979.name: Elemental Surge

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Grants your weapon [Surge|Surges]. Non-[Melee] [Projectile] [Attack|Attacks] with that weapon Consume [Surge|Surges] to cause the [Projectile|Projectiles] fired to explode at the end of their flight.
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

stats: When you Consume a [Charges|Charge], [Trigger] Elemental Surge to gain 3 [Surge|Lightning Surges]

8143.name: Lead me through Grace...
stats: +1 to [Spirit] for every 8 [ItemEnergyShield|Item Energy Shield] on Equipped Body Armour
+1 to [Spirit] for every 20 [Evasion|Evasion Rating] on Equipped Body Armour

8272.name: Weapon Master
stats: 100 Passive Skill Points become [WeaponSetPassiveSkillPoints|Weapon Set Skill Points]

8415.name: Sanguimancy

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Drink the blood of your enemies to restore your Life. While active, enemies you kill have a chance to spawn a Life [Remnant], and [HitDamage|Hitting] a target spawns a Life [Remnant] every few seconds. Picking up a Life [Remnant] grants you Life which can [Overflow|Overflow] maximum Life.

stats: 25% chance to spawn a [Remnant] on killing an enemy
Spawn a [Remnant] on [HitDamage|Hitting] a target, no more than once every 3 seconds

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

stats: Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to Base Mana Cost

8525.name: Leather Bindings
stats: Body Armour grants regenerate 3% of maximum Life per second

9294.name: Critical Strike
stats:
Chance to [HitDamage|Hit] with [Attack|Attacks] can [ExceedChance|exceed 100%]
Gain additional [Critical|Critical Hit] Chance equal to 25% of excess chance to [HitDamage|Hit] with [Attack|Attacks]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Consume charges from your Mana [Flask] to throw a flask that explodes, dealing [Physical] [Attack] damage in an area and [Aggravate|Aggravating Bleeding] on Enemies hit. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack]
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

9988.name: Smith's Masterwork
stats: Can only use a [ItemRarity|Normal] Body Armour
+200 to [Armour] for each Connected Notable Passive Skill Allocated

9997.name: Molten Symbol
stats: Body Armour grants 25% of [Physical] Damage from [HitDamage|Hits] taken as [Fire] Damage

10371.name: Whoever Pays Best
stats: There is no [Limit] on the number of [Banner|Banners] you can place

10561.name: Navira's Fracturing

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Command] Navira to fracture all nearby areas of [ChilledGround|Chilled Ground] that have enemies standing on them, doing high [Spell] damage with extreme [Freeze] potential.

stats: [Chill|Chills] Enemies as though dealing 200% more damage

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "My heart was fractured. I believed Kelari's words. I knew not his true nature... his ambition. I convinced Ruzhan there were cowards among his ranks. I failed you. And I accept my fate."
Navira confessed her failure to Varashta.

10694.name: Seething Body
stats: Gain [ElementalArchon|Elemental Archon] when you cast a [Spell] while on [HighInfernalFlame|High Infernal Flame]
[ElementalArchon|Elemental Archon] does not expire while on [HighInfernalFlame|High Infernal Flame]
Lose [ElementalArchon|Elemental Archon] on reaching maximum Infernal Flame

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, conjures a glittering barrier that accumulates protective gemstone Motes of each [Attributes|Attribute] type over time, but loses a random Mote when you are [HitDamage|Hit].

stats: Gains a random Mote every 2 seconds

Maximum of each [Attributes|Attribute] of Mote is 3 plus the number of Skills you have which require that [Attributes|Attribute]
Single-[Attributes|Attribute] Skills grant twice as many maximum Motes
5% increased Life Regeneration rate per [Intelligence] Mote
5% increased Mana Regeneration rate per [Intelligence] Mote

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

12488.name: Remnant Range
stats: [Remnant|Remnants] can be collected from 25% further away

12795.name: Path of the Sorceress
stats: Can Allocate Passive Skills from the Sorceress's starting point

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Channelling|Channel] to [ESRecharge|Recharge Energy Shield] and allow that [ESRecharge|Recharge] to [Overflow|Overflow]. [Channelling] ends when you take damage or your [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] is fully [Overflow|Overflowed].
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

12882.name: Tempest Caller

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Create a stationary [Fire], [Cold] or [Lightning] storm at a target location for a duration, based on the highest [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] type for the [HitDamage|Hit] that [Trigger|Triggered] the storm. [HitDamage|Hits] which do not deal [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage] will not [Trigger] the storm.
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

stats: Trigger Elemental Storm on [Critical|Critical Hit] with [Spell|Spells]

13174.name: Pyromantic Pact
stats:
Maximum Mana is replaced by twice as much Maximum Infernal Flame
Gain Infernal Flame instead of spending Mana for Skill costs
Take maximum Life and Energy Shield as [Fire] Damage when Infernal Flame reaches maximum
Lose all Infernal Flame on reaching maximum Infernal Flame
25% of Infernal Flame lost per second if none was gained in the past 2 seconds

13289.name: Barya of Kelari

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Summon Kelari, an invulnerable Sand Djinn [Minion], to do your bidding. Kelari will only act when you [Command] him to do so. Kelari delivers swift [HitDamage|Hits] with massive [Critical|Critical Hit] potential.

pages.description: [Command] Kelari to throw a volley of knives at the target location. The knives burrow into the ground, then erupt into the air after a short delay, dealing [Spell] damage.
stats: Creates erupting blades within 3 metre radius

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "And you... there was no excuse for your actions. You defiled them! You have tainted the very sands with the blood of your own! Yet the war rages on. You have achieved nothing. You must pay."
Varashta condemned Kelari to the ritual of the <i>{barya}, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.

13772.name: Flowing Metal
stats: Body Armour grants +50% of [Armour] also applies to [ElementalDamage|Elemental Damage]

14131.name: Ruzhan's Fury

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Command] Ruzhan to conjure two volleys of flaming embers and fire them forward. The embers explode on impact, dealing [Spell] damage.
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "Yes... they fell by my blade and fire lashed them for their betrayal! No <i>{dekhara} is exempt from fighting back the Winter before us, lest they too know the Doom of the Desert!"
Ruzhan fumed at Varashta, in pure defiance.

14429.name: Advanced Thaumaturgy
stats: Gem [Quality] grants Socketed Skills an additional effect

15275.name: Totem Cast and Attack Speed
stats: [Spell|Spells] Cast by [Totem|Totems] have 5% increased Cast Speed
[Attack|Attacks] used by Totems have 5% increased [Attack] Speed

16204.name: Sacred Flow
stats: +40 to [Spirit] for each of your empty [Charm] slots

16249.name: Watch How I Do It
stats:
[Allies] in your [Presence] gain added [Attack] Damage equal
to 25% of your main hand Weapon's damage

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Attaches an ethereal bell to your back. [Critical|Critical Hits] with other Skills will cause the bell to ring out, damaging nearby enemies.
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Activate to summon a [Reviving] Infernal Hound which [Ignite|Ignites] enemies near it.

stats: Minions [Ignite|Ignite] Enemies within a radius of 2.5 metres as though dealt Base [Fire] Damage equal to 20% of Minion's Maximum Life

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

17788.name: Crystalline Phylactery
stats: Can Socket a [ItemRarity|non-Unique] [BasicJewel|Basic Jewel] into the Phylactery
100% increased Effect of bonuses gained from Socketed [Jewel]
50% more Mana Cost of Skills if you have no [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]

18146.name: Reduced Attribute Requirements
stats: Equipment and Skill Gems have 4% reduced [Attributes|Attribute] Requirements

18158.name: Bringer of Flame
stats:
All Damage from you and [Allies|Allies] in your [Presence|Presence]
[Contributes|contributes] to [Flammability] and [Ignite] [BuffMagnitude|Magnitudes]

18280.name: Mind Phylacteries
stats: Can instead consume 25% of maximum Mana to trigger [Charm|Charms] with insufficient charges

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Consume charges from your Mana [Flask] to throw a flask that explodes, dealing [Cold] [Attack] damage in an area and inflicting [Exposure]. This damage is not based on your unarmed damage, so this is not considered an [UnarmedAttack|Unarmed Attack]
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, ethereal bells periodically appear near you. Your [HitDamage|Hits] immediately destroy the bells, creating a shockwave that damages nearby enemies and causes a [HeavyStun|Heavy Stun] on enemies that are [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun]. The bells are themselves always [PrimedStun|Primed for Stun], they can be [CullingStrike|Culled], and [HitDamage|Hits] against them are always [Critical|Critical Hits].

stats: Tempest Bells are destroyed after an additional 1 [HitDamage|Hits]
Bells appear within 3 metre radius of you

Modifiers to Cooldown Recovery Rate also apply to
bell appearance frequency
Tempest Bells are destroyed after an additional 1 [HitDamage|Hits]

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

20701.name: Instruments of Power
stats: You can equip a [Focus] while wielding a [Staff]

21519.name: Shared Companion Damage
stats: 10% increased Damage while your [Companion] is in your [Presence]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, gains [Energy|Energy] when you [HitDamage|Hit] enemies with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks] and triggers socketed [Fire] spells on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy].

stats: Gains 3 [Energy] per [Power] of enemies you [HitDamage|Hit] with [Melee] [Attack|Attacks], modified by the percentage of the enemy's [AilmentThreshold|Ailment Threshold] the [HitDamage|Hit] will deal

Can only socket [Fire] [Spell|Spells]
Triggers all Socketed [Spell|Spells] and loses all [Energy|Energy] on reaching maximum [Energy|Energy]
Has 10 maximum Energy per 0.1 seconds of base cast time of Socketed [Spell|Spells]

grantedSkill.descrText: Place one or more Skill Gems into this Meta Gem's sockets in the Skills Panel. The socketed Skills will be incorporated into the Meta Gem's effect.

23005.name: Renly's Training
stats: Gain 35% Base Chance to [Block] from [Equipped] [Shield] instead of the Shield's value

23265.name: Kelari's Deception

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Command] Kelari to create a blast at the target location that deals [Spell] damage, and leave behind a clone that persists for a short duration. This skill can store multiple charges, and using it again while a clone from a previous use is still alive causes that clone to explode, dealing even more damage.

stats: 50% more damage for each previous time this Skill has been used consecutively, up to 300%

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "Listen not to his simpering words. He means to languish before you to weaken your resolve! He is duplicitous. An assassin, thriving on deception and lies. His lust for power is what drove his choice!"
Outrage trembled in Ruzhan's voice at the sentencing.

23352.name: Rupture the Soul
stats: [Curse|Cursed] Enemies killed by you, or by [Allies] in your [Presence], have a 33% chance to explode, dealing a quarter of their maximum Life as [Chaos] damage

23508.name: Thrilling Chase
stats: Benefits from consuming [Charges|Frenzy Charges] for your Skills have 50% chance to be doubled

24039.name: Beidat's Hand
stats: +1 to Maximum [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] per 8 Maximum Life

24226.name: Bullseye
stats: Apply 10 [CriticalWeakness|Critical Weakness] to Enemies when [Consume|Consuming] a [Mark] on them

25092.name: Critical Damage Bonus on You
stats: [HitDamage|Hits] against you have 12% reduced [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Shapeshift] into a demon, vastly boosting the power of your [Spell|Spells]. You gain Demonflame every second you remain in demon form, causing your Life to be lost at an ever-increasing rate. Maximum 10 Demonflame. Revert to human form if you reach 1 Life, use a Skill that isn't a [Spell], or reactivate this Skill.

stats: 12% increased Cast Speed while in Demon Form

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

25653.name: Kelari's Judgment

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Channelling|Channel] and [Command] Kelari to [Channelling|Channel] alongside you, creating blades that hang over the target location. The longer you [Channelling|Channel], the more blades Kelari will create. Upon release, his blades plunge into the ground and create shockwaves that deal [Spell] damage.

stats: 25% more area of effect per stage
125% more Damage with [HitDamage|Hits] for each stage

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "Knowing where and when to plunge your knife is more important than the sharpness of your blade. I will not forget my error... and I will be a living example of your wisdom, dear <i>{Sekhema}."
Kelari accepted Varashta's sentence and committed himself to her.

25683.name: Ruzhan's Reckoning

grantedSkill.secDescrText: [Command] Ruzhan to teleport to the target location. Upon arrival, the Djinn deals [Spell] damage to enemies around him then slams his blazing sword into the ground, creating a wave of lava that also deals [Spell] damage.
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "I stand before you, as your humble servant. Though I was betrayed, I would do it all again, if it would have saved us. But I accept your sentence. I will atone. I pledge myself to you... forevermore."
Ruzhan accepted his fate at the <i>{barya} ritual site.

25781.name: Sap of Nightmares
stats: [Leech] recovers based on [Chaos] Damage as well as [Physical] Damage

26085.name: Necromantic Conduit
stats: While you are not on [LowMana|Low Mana], you and [Allies] in your [Presence] have [UnholyMight|Unholy Might]
Lose 5% of maximum Mana per Second

26283.name: Choice of Mana
stats: [Remnant|Remnants] can be collected from 50% further away
All [FlamesOfChayula|Flames of Chayula] that you manifest are [BlueFlamesOfChayula|Blue]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, passively leaves afterimages of your recent past. Cast the [Spell] to return to the oldest afterimage, teleporting to that location and resetting your Life, Mana and [EnergyShield|Energy Shield] to the values they had at the time. Removes any upcoming damage delayed by Phased Form on use.

stats: This Spell's Cast Speed cannot be modified

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

27667.name: Whispers of the Flesh
stats: Targets [Curse|Cursed] by you have 100% reduced Life Regeneration Rate
Targets [Curse|Cursed] by you have at least 15% of Life [Reservation|Reserved]

27773.name: The Mórrigan's Guidance
stats: Gain a Vivid Wisp when Vivid Stampede ends
Stags deal 20% more damage per leap

28153.name: Phased Form
stats: 4 seconds after being Damaged by an Enemy [HitDamage|Hit], take Damage equal to 30% of that [HitDamage|Hit]'s Damage

28254.name: Sacred Unity
stats: Bear Spirit gains [SpiritWalkerBearAura|Embrace of the Wild]
Central [Projectile] of Owl Feather-[Empowered] Skills leaves a trail of [SoaringGround|Soaring Ground]

28431.name: Eternal Life
stats: Your Life cannot change while you have [EnergyShield|Energy Shield]

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Build [Glory] by [HitDamage|Hitting] enemies with [ElementalDamage|Elemental] damage. When you have maximum [Glory], you may become the walking Apocalypse for a duration, [Trigger|Triggering] one of multiple powerful [ElementalDamage|Elemental] Skills at an interval while this [Buff] lasts.

stats: Duration of the Apocalypse is 12 seconds
[Trigger|Triggers] one of three disasters every 0.75 seconds

pages.description: Targets an area or an enemy, causing a series of icy hailstones to rain down in an area over a duration.
Targets an area or an enemy, calling down a massive meteor to strike an area, dealing [Fire] damage and contributing to your enemies' extinction.
Targets an area or an enemy, causing a rapid buildup of pulsing [Lightning] damage in an area that culminates in a powerful final [Lightning] strike.

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

29074.name: Overwhelming Toxicity
stats: Double the number of your [Poison|Poisons] that targets can be affected by at the same time

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Sacrifice the [Corpse] of a [Rarity|Rare] Monster to grant you its [MonsterModifiers|Modifiers] for a duration, or gain a single random [MonsterModifiers|Modifier] at the cost of your own life force.

stats:
When used on yourself, removes 20% of maximum Life to grant a random [MonsterModifiers|Monster Modifier], replacing any previous
[MonsterModifiers|Modifier] gained this way

grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

30904.name: Harmony Within
stats: [HitDamage|Hit] damage is taken from Mana before Life if your current Mana is higher than your current Life

30996.name: Gem Studded
stats:
For each colour of Socketed Support Gem that is most numerous, gain:
•Red: [HitDamage|Hits] against you have no [CriticalDamageBonus|Critical Damage Bonus]
•Blue: Skills have 30% less cost
•Green: 40% less Movement Speed Penalty from using Skills while Moving

grantedSkill.secDescrText: While active, creates a short-lived illusory copy of yourself whenever you dodge roll. The copy can be damaged by enemies, and copies that are destroyed by an enemy will cause damaging explosions. Copies created this way have 1 Life.
grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

31223.name: Crimson Power
stats: Gain additional maximum Life equal to 100% of the [ItemEnergyShield|Item Energy Shield] on [Equipped] Body Armour

32637.name: Stay Light, Use Cover
stats: Enemies have an [Accuracy|Accuracy] Penalty against you based on Distance

32705.name: Barya of Navira

grantedSkill.secDescrText: Summon Navira, an invulnerable Water Djinn [Minion] to do your bidding. Navira will only act when you [Command] her to do so, bestowing restorative blessings upon you and your [Allies] with her [Spell|Spells].

stats:
Triggers Navira's Calming when [Command|Commanded] to
use a Skill, granting nearby [Allies] 10% increased
Mana Regeneration for 4 seconds

pages.description: [Command] Navira to create a bubble shield which absorbs a portion of the damage dealt by enemies standing outside the shield. grantedSkill.descrText: Skills can be managed in the Skills Panel.

flavourText: "You knew the twisted plan these fools devised. As Tale-woman, you are their compass in the sandstorm. Yet... you did not act. And now we mourn these honoured dead. You must pay."
Varashta condemned Navira to the ritual of the <i>{barya}, sentenced to serve as a Djinn.
